---
title: "Projects"
---

## Job Postings Data Analysis (PySpark)

- Processed large-scale job postings dataset using PySpark
- Built relational tables and executed SQL queries
- Analyzed salary trends, job roles, and industry demand

---

## Data Visualization Projects

- Created dashboards using Tableau and PowerBI
- Visualized trends in business and job market data
- Presented insights through charts and reports

---

## Audit & Reporting Analytics

- Built data-driven reports to support audit processes
- Worked with stakeholders to deliver actionable insights
